sources.title: The Client (JOHN GRISHAM BOOK ADAPTATION full movie in full length, German movies complete 2025)
sources.description:
💙 Ganze Filme in voller Länge komplett auf Deutsch - jetzt abonnieren: http://bit.ly/NetzkinoAbo
📺 Diese Oscar®-nominierte Verfilmung von JOHN GRISHAMs ("Die Firma" & "Die Akte") Roman bietet Szene für Szene Spannung pur! Die Hauptrollen in diesem temporeichen Thriller übernehmen die Oscar®-Preisträger* SUSAN SARANDON ("Dead Man Walking - Sein letzter Gang") und TOMMY LEE JONES ("Auf der Flucht"): Der kleine Mark wird zur Schachfigur in einer tödlichen Partie. Nur eine mutige Anwältin steht Mark bei und setzt dabei nicht nur ihre Karriere, sondern unerwartet sogar ihr Leben aufs Spiel...

DER KLIENT (1994)
Originaltitel: The Client
Mit: Susan Sarandon, Mary-Louise Parker, Brad Renfro, Tommy Lee Jones
Regie: Joel Schumacher
FSK: Freigegeben ab 12 Jahren

INHALTSANGABE:
Der elfjährige Mark Swan ist mit seinem kleinen Bruder zur falschen Zeit am falschen Platz. Durch Zufall erfährt er von einem tödlichen Geheimnis und gerät so zwischen die Fronten von FBI und Mafia. Seine Zeit scheint abgelaufen zu sein... 
#Netzkino #ganzerFilm #JohnGrisham

sources.title: The Client (JUSTICE THRILLER full movie with TOMMY LEE JONES, stream 4K movies in German)

metadata.Plot: Mark Sway is an 11-year-old boy who lives with his mother and brother in a trailer. One day, he and his brother are hanging out when a car pulls over beside them. The driver then sticks a hose in his exhaust and puts the other end into the car. Mark pulls it out. But the man sees him and grabs him and takes inside the car. The man talks to Mark then later shoots himself. The shock sends Mark's brother into a catatonic state. .And one of his clients is a member of a mob family who is suspected of killing a Senator who was trying to take down his family. But because the Senator's body is missing, they can't prosecute him. Reggie thinks Foltrigg thinks the lawyer told Mark where the body is which is why he wants to speak to him. Mark goes to meet Roy and when he threatens him, Mark steps out then Reggie comes in with a recording of his conversation with Mark telling him that made several violations. In the meantime, the mobster is told by the head of the family to take care of Mark. So, he threatens Mark. Mark doesn't know what to do and learns that Reggie has some secrets of her own and is uncertain if he can trust her.
metadata.Writer: John Grisham, Akiva Goldsman, Robert Getchell
metadata.Actors: Susan Sarandon, Tommy Lee Jones, Brad Renfro
metadata.Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 4 nominations total
